General.Name: SDM SE
General.Description: sdm SE provides security services in the Munich. The company offers security services, including plant and property protection, patrol and guard, key and data carrier management, locking, trade fairs and events, courier and transport, and personal protection security services. It also provides reception, cleaning, and chauffeur services, as well as security analysis and implementation services. sdm SE was founded in 2020 and is based in Munich, Germany. sdm SE operates as a subsidiary of Renegat GmbH.
